headline: Pluto Film Locks Global Distribution for Alicia Scherson's Psychological Thriller 'Summer War'
lede: Chilean director Alicia Scherson's latest psychological thriller is set to make waves at international film festivals, with Berlin-based Pluto Film securing worldwide sales rights.
body:
Alicia Scherson's fifth feature film, *Summer War*, is poised to captivate international audiences after Pluto Film secured comprehensive global distribution rights. The psychological thriller will first bow at the 25th Tribeca Film Festival in June before navigating the competitive Cannes Marché du Film marketplace.

Scherson, known for her nuanced storytelling in previous works like *Play*, continues to demonstrate her skill in crafting complex narrative landscapes. The film represents her second literary adaptation, suggesting a continued artistic approach that transforms written source material into compelling cinematic experiences.

Pluto Film's aggressive acquisition signals growing international interest in Latin American cinema, particularly psychological narratives that transcend traditional genre boundaries. The Berlin-based distribution company has a reputation for championing innovative international projects that challenge audience expectations.

While specific plot details remain closely guarded, industry insiders suggest *Summer War* explores psychological tension through an intricate narrative framework. The film's festival circuit debut will provide critical insight into Scherson's latest artistic vision.
key_facts: Fifth feature film by Chilean director Alicia Scherson
Pluto Film acquired worldwide sales rights
World premiere at 25th Tribeca Film Festival
